response.justification: Excellent fit with 19 years of full-stack development exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong alignment with primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and demonstrated testing culture throughout career. Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP—a key requirement. Architecture and design experience clearly demonstrated through multiple senior/staff roles with shipping at scale. Primary gaps are Nest.js and PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned, though deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise indicates fast ramp-up.
strengths: 19 years of full-stack development with proven TypeScript, Node.js, React, and database expertise across multiple companies and technical scales
Currently building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, directly addressing the AI agent development requirement
Strong architecture and design background evidenced by multiple senior/staff engineer roles, plus extensive teaching/workshop history demonstrating systems-level knowledge
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite strong Node.js/TypeScript foundation; would require framework-specific ramp-up
PostgreSQL absent from skills list though MongoDB, MySQL, and SQL experience present; relational database knowledge gap exists
Current role (April 2025–present) lacks shipped product details; recent full-stack feature ownership and scale not clearly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Breadth and depth of full-stack experience (19 years)
Active AI agent and infrastructure work aligns directly with role requirements
Primary framework (Nest.js) and database (PostgreSQL) not in explicit experience
